leads.issues: Every page's footer still reads 'Copyright 2015 Alert Locksmiths Limited. Site Designed by Mobile Marketing New Zealand. All Rights Reserved' - visible to every visitor, eleven years out of date. Separately, the homepage has no meta description tag at all - confirmed by inspecting the page's head metadata, where the field is simply absent - so Google auto-generates a search snippet instead of showing something the business actually chose to say.
leads.opportunity: Updating the stale copyright year and writing a real meta description are both same-day fixes. Expected within 30 days: a homepage that reads as actively maintained rather than frozen in 2015, and a proper search snippet for 'locksmith Ellerslie' and 'locksmith Auckland' searches instead of an auto-generated one.

leads.issues: On the Contact page, the 'Number' link's visible text reads '03 4050 9179' but the underlying tel: link actually dials a completely different number, '0475 134 060' - confirmed in the page's raw HTML - so anyone tapping it on mobile calls the wrong number. Separately, the homepage has no meta description tag anywhere in the <head> - confirmed by inspecting the raw HTML, where only a bare <title> exists with no location. The Contact page's Saturday hours also contain a typo, reading '7:300 AM - 3:00 PM'.
leads.opportunity: Fixing the mismatched phone link is a five-minute fix that stops real calls from reaching the wrong number. Expected within 30 days: no more misdirected calls, and a proper search snippet for 'mobile car detailing Yarra Valley' searches instead of an auto-generated one.
